title: Apply Security Fixes using Open Spec
steps: Execute the `Open Spec fast forward` command.
Instruct Open Spec to address the security issues found in the current report.
Execute the `OPSX apply` command to implement the changes generated by Open Spec.
rationale: Provides clear command-line instructions for using Open Spec to automate the generation and application of security fixes based on a report. The 'instruct Open Spec' step implies a parameter or interactive input that is not fully detailed in the chunk, hence slightly lower specificity and implementability.
